raw_consumer_statement: A drive by merchant stopped and asked if I would like some pine straw installed for {$6.00} per bale, I told them ok just keep it under XXXX bales, being I was just refreshing the front yard. They installed XXXX bales for {$160.00}, I paid with a citi costco card, they ran it on their phone and left, when the credit card statement arrived I had been charged {$2800.00}. I immediately called the company ( XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX, no answer, filed a dispute online with citi costco, went to XXXX XXXXXXXX store to fax/email receipt, couple weeks later they denied my claim saying they did not receive my receipt, asked them if I could send again, called them a couple days later and they said they had received it and would reopen, couple weeks later, denied due to no receipt, I don't know what else to do, we are retired and live on a fixed income, {$2600.00} is a lot of money, thanks
